title: An Act to Regulate Virtual Currency Kiosks
committee: Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services
last_house_action: 6/9/2025 - This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 6/10/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED - Emergency - 2/3 Elected Required, in concurrence.

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on March 28, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2

Report READ and ACCEPTED . READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-300) READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (S-300) . Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-300) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED - Emergency - 2/3 Elected Required, in concurrence.
